description: "Use when working in this repo so agents remember it is a fork of obra/superpowers tailored to daniel-gll's needs."
applyTo: "**"
---

# Repository Fork Context

This repository is a fork of https://github.com/obra/superpowers. The fork is maintained as daniel-gll/superpowers and is tailored to the owner's needs. Treat upstream as the original project and origin as the fork when that context matters.
